summary: PR #2699 improved mnDiagram-family matching in src/melee/mn by changing three files: mndiagram.c, mndiagram2.c, and mndiagram3.c. The PR body reports text-score improvements, three new 100% matches in mndiagram2, no regressions versus upstream report.json, and explicitly says stale assert/string-table shapes from an investigation branch were not reintroduced.

key_files.role: Main mnDiagram follow-up matching work; diff excerpt shows helper extraction for repeated count/sum/cursor logic, local declaration/lifetime reshaping, JObj call adjustments, and progress on mnDiagram_8023FC28, mnDiagram_802417D0, mnDiagram_80241E78, mnDiagram_8024227C, mnDiagram_80242C0C, and mnDiagram_80243434.

what_changed: Improved match scores for mn/mndiagram.c from 98.418230 to 99.271860, including substantial gains for mnDiagram_8024227C, mnDiagram_80242C0C, and near-complete mnDiagram_80243434 per PR body.
Added or reused small static inline helpers in mndiagram.c for repeated calculations, including mnDiagram_SumFighterKOsClamped and mnDiagram_CountUnlockedFightersInline.

Refactored repeated visible cursor traversal code in mndiagram.c through mnDiagram_GetVisibleNameCursorFrom and mnDiagram_GetVisibleFighterCursorFrom, with return type and local result-shape changes shown in the diff.
Reworked local declarations, casts, aliases, and stack-shaping in mndiagram.c functions such as mnDiagram_8023FC28, mnDiagram_802417D0, mnDiagram_80241E78, mnDiagram_8024227C, and mnDiagram_80242C0C.

Improved mndiagram2.c text matching from 92.575300 to 99.229190, with PR and bot evidence for three newly 100% matched functions: mnDiagram2_UpdateHeader, mnDiagram2_GetAggregatedFighterRank, and mnDiagram2_GetRankedName.
Improved mndiagram3.c text matching from 95.141170 to 97.843285, including reported gains for fn_802461BC, mnDiagram3_80245BA4, and mnDiagram3_8024714C.

The PR body reports verification with python3 tools/check/main.py src/melee/mn, ninja build/GALE01/main.dol, build.sha1 check, report.json generation, and comparison against upstream baseline with 0 regressions.
smart_moves: Kept the PR scoped to current-source match wins instead of reintroducing stale assert/string-table shapes from the investigation branch.
Preserved symbolic forms JOBJ_HIDDEN and HSD_ASSERTREPORT in mndiagram2 rather than reverting to raw/generated shapes.
Extracted repeated unlocked-fighter counting and clamped fighter-KO summing into small inline helpers, reducing duplicated generated-looking loops in the large table-population function.
Used local helper calls for visible cursor selection instead of retaining multiple hand-expanded goto/pointer traversal blocks in mnDiagram_8024227C.
Included explicit match-score deltas and a narrow mn-directory test/build/report plan in the PR body.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a large partially matched function repeats the same unlocked-count, visible-cursor, or clamped-sum logic, small static inline helpers can both improve source readability and support matching progress.

source_update_candidates.title: Matching follow-up PRs should avoid reintroducing stale exploratory assert/string-table shapes
source_update_candidates.text: Consider adding an example under infer-authored-source-style, assert-report-macros, or no-string-literal-symbol-regression: a follow-up matching PR can improve scores while explicitly not carrying stale assert or string-table shapes from an investigation branch, and should preserve symbolic macro forms such as JOBJ_HIDDEN and HSD_ASSERTREPORT when current source supports them.

source_update_candidates.reason: The existing standards already cover this pattern generally; this PR provides a compact concrete example that may be useful as a source-owned standard example if the curator wants one.

source_update_candidates.title: Document caution for stack-object dummy arrays replacing PAD_STACK
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2699 contains a visible stack-shaping tactic where PAD_STACK in mnDiagram_80242C0C is replaced by local byte arrays referenced through void casts. If recurring, standards could clarify that this is a narrow matching tactic requiring objdiff/regression evidence, not ordinary style.
evidence_refs: raw_diff.diff: mnDiagram_80242C0C adds stack_obj[8], stack_obj2[4], stack_obj3[20] and void address references
human_pr_text.md: verification and 0 regressions claim
source_update_candidates.reason: Current matching-tactics standards already require evidence for PAD_STACK and dummy locals; this PR supplies a concrete example but should not be promoted without curator review.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that all mndiagram2 or mndiagram3 changed functions are fully matched; only specific 100% functions are supported by the PR body and bot report.
Do not treat the dismissed empty review as approval feedback or reviewer intent.
Do not promote stack_obj dummy arrays, comma-expression casts, or generated-style var_r locals as preferred source style; they are only observed matching tactics in this PR slice.
Do not claim that the intake independently verified the build, SHA1, objdiff, or report.json results; verification evidence is PR-reported.
